purpose: 用于自动打标时的优先级排序与冲突消解

conflict_resolution.within_mutually_exclusive_group: 同互斥组出现多个标签时，按 feature_tags 顺序保留第一个，其余自动剔除
conflict_resolution.cross_category_conflict: 不同类别允许共存，不主动删除

within_mutually_exclusive_group_i18n.zh-CN: 同互斥组出现多个标签时，按 feature_tags 顺序保留第一个，其余自动剔除
within_mutually_exclusive_group_i18n.en-US: When multiple tags appear in one mutually exclusive group, keep the first tag according to feature tag order and remove the rest automatically.
within_mutually_exclusive_group_i18n.ja-JP: When multiple tags appear in one mutually exclusive group, keep the first tag according to feature tag order and remove the rest automatically.
within_mutually_exclusive_group_i18n.ko-KR: When multiple tags appear in one mutually exclusive group, keep the first tag according to feature tag order and remove the rest automatically.

cross_category_conflict_i18n.zh-CN: 不同类别允许共存，不主动删除
cross_category_conflict_i18n.en-US: Allow tags across different categories to coexist and do not remove them proactively.
cross_category_conflict_i18n.ja-JP: Allow tags across different categories to coexist and do not remove them proactively.
cross_category_conflict_i18n.ko-KR: Allow tags across different categories to coexist and do not remove them proactively.

post_rules.description: 头发长度标签冲突时优先保留具体长度，不保留泛化长度。

description_i18n.zh-CN: 头发长度标签冲突时优先保留具体长度，不保留泛化长度。
description_i18n.en-US: When hair-length tags conflict, keep the more specific length and remove generic length tags.
description_i18n.ja-JP: 髪の長さのラベルが競合する場合は、一般的な長さではなく、特定の長さが好ましい。
description_i18n.ko-KR: 모발 길이 라벨이 충돌하는 경우, 일반화된 길이가 아닌 특정 길이가 선호됩니다.

post_rules.description: 胸围标签仅保留一个，防止平胸/巨乳并存。

description_i18n.zh-CN: 胸围标签仅保留一个，防止平胸/巨乳并存。
description_i18n.en-US: Keep only one chest-size tag to avoid contradictory combinations.
description_i18n.ja-JP: 平らな/大きな乳房の共存を防ぐために、1つのバストラベルのみを保管してください。
description_i18n.ko-KR: 납작/큰 가슴이 공존하는 것을 방지하기 위해 가슴 라벨을 하나만 유지하십시오.

post_rules.description: 当某类别标签数超限时，按置信度升序删除。

description_i18n.zh-CN: 当某类别标签数超限时，按置信度升序删除。
description_i18n.en-US: When one category exceeds the tag limit, remove tags in ascending confidence order.
description_i18n.ja-JP: カテゴリ内のラベルの数が制限を超えると、信頼度の昇順で削除されます。
description_i18n.ko-KR: 카테고리의 레이블 수가 한도를 초과하면 신뢰도 오름차순으로 삭제됩니다.

purpose_i18n.zh-CN: 用于自动打标时的优先级排序与冲突消解
purpose_i18n.en-US: Priority sorting and conflict resolution rules used by automatic tagging.
purpose_i18n.ja-JP: 自動マーキング中の優先順位付けと競合解決に使用
purpose_i18n.ko-KR: 자동 마킹 중 우선순위 지정 및 충돌 해결에 사용됨
